title: Canada Child Benefit (CCB) Taxpayer Statistics - Canada.ca
content:
## Canada Child Benefit Statistics
The Canada child benefit (CCB) statistics tables present data based on the information that the Canada Revenue Agency (CRA) collected and processed for all individual recipients for a specific benefit year.
For further information on the CCB please refer to the benefits section.
Select a benefit year:
- 2024-2025 (2023 tax year)
- 2023-2024 (2022 tax year)
- 2022-2023 (2021 tax year)
- 2021-2022 (2020 tax year)
- 2020-2021 (2019 tax year)
- 2019-2020 (2018 tax year)
- 2018-2019 (2017 tax year)
- 2017-2018 (2016 tax year)
- 2016-2017 (2015 tax year)

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
